title: Fig. 1 in Species-specific qPCR assays allow for high-resolution population assessment of four species avian schistosome that cause swimmer's itch in recreational lakes
author: Rudko, Sydney P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Abundance of cercariae by sampling site. Water samples were obtained in mid-June and cercariae abundance was determined using the pan-avian schistosomes qPCR.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Abundance of cercariae by sampling site. Water samples were obtained in mid-June and cercariae abundance was determined using the pan-avian schistosomes qPCR.
